Title: Ghost in the Shell: Stand Alone Complex

Episodes.Title: Reembody
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Mamoru Oshii
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Kirk Baily, Kevin Brief
Episodes.Plot: Two years have past since Section 9 was forcefully disbanded by the Umibozu.

Episodes.Title: Night Cruise
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Mamoru Oshii, Kenji Kamiyama
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Robert Axelrod, Kevin Brief
Episodes.Plot: Following nuclear World War III and non-nuclear World War IV (also referred to as the Second Vietnam War), Japan passed an act known as the Refugee Special Action Policy, inviting war refugees from all across Asia to enter Japan.

Episodes.Title: Cash Eye
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Mamoru Oshii
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Steve Apostolina, Kirk Baily
Episodes.Plot: A formal investigation into Mr. Todoko has yielded evidence that he may be managing former Secretary General Yakushima's assets.

Episodes.Title: Natural Enemy
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Mamoru Oshii, Kenji Kamiyama
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Steve Apostolina, Kevin Brief
Episodes.Plot: The largest live fire exercise ever conducted by the Japanese Self Defense Force is currently underway in advance of the Prime Minister's planned announcement of the repealing of the Refugee Special Action Policy.

Episodes.Title: Inductance
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Mamoru Oshii
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Kirk Baily, Kevin Brief
Episodes.Plot: Prime Minister Kayabuki has formally renounced the Refugee Special Action Policy, a move that has drawn much criticism from refugees all over Japan.

Episodes.Title: Excavation
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Mamoru Oshii
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Kevin Brief, Joe Cappelletti
Episodes.Plot: The prime suspect behind an attempt to blackmail the Ministry of Energy has turned up dead in Nihima City. Originally presumed to be a victim of a tragic accident; however, a more thorough examination of the body turns up evidence...

Episodes.Title: Pu239
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Mamoru Oshii
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, John Bishop, Kevin Brief
Episodes.Plot: Aramaki is summoned to the Prime Minister's office after plans to ship plutonium from the Uchikon 7 district of the Shonjuku Refugee District were leaked to terrorists.

Episodes.Title: Fake Food
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Mamoru Oshii
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Kirk Baily, Kevin Brief
Episodes.Plot: Tired of being manipulated by Gohda, Aramaki decides to take the initiative and conduct his own investigation on the Individual Eleven case while simultaneously looking into the Cabinet Intelligence Agency.

Episodes.Title: Ambivalence
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Mamoru Oshii
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Kevin Brief, Mari Devon
Episodes.Plot: The failed attempt to secure the ex-GSDA officer for questioning has proven to be the straw that breaks the camels back, as Major Kusanagi decides to go directly into the Cabinet Intelligence Agency database to determine what Gohd...

Episodes.Title: Trial
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Mamoru Oshii
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Brian Beacock, Kevin Brief
Episodes.Plot: On his way home from work Togusa becomes involved in a domestic dispute between Yukadi Shisharow and her boyfriend when the lady suddenly trips in front of Togusa's car and screams for help.

Episodes.Title: Affection
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Mamoru Oshii
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Catherine Battistone, Kevin Brief
Episodes.Plot: Batou and Togusa are testing eight potential new recruits for Section 9.

Episodes.Title: Selecon
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Mamoru Oshii, Kenji Kamiyama
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, William Bassett, John Bishop
Episodes.Plot: The Tachikomas locate a stealth gate that can only be accessed through the European Satellite system. After passing through the gate, Boma recovers a suspicious file believed to be the virus that infected The Individual Eleven.

Episodes.Title: Make Up
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Mamoru Oshii, Kenji Kamiyama
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, John Bishop, Kevin Brief
Episodes.Plot: Aramaki calls a briefing to discuss the events surrounding the sudden appearance and murder/suicide of the members of The Individual Eleven.

Episodes.Title: Poker Face
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Mamoru Oshii, Kenji Kamiyama
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, JB Blanc, Kevin Brief
Episodes.Plot: Representatives from the American Empire have arrived in Japan to discuss a new security treaty and Section 9 is one of the various groups assigned to secure the building where the talks are taking place.

Episodes.Title: Pat
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Mamoru Oshii
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Kevin Brief, Erik Davies
Episodes.Plot: Section 9's Tachikoma fleet is down for routine maintenance. While the technicians inspect the fleet, the think tanks begin a philosophical discussion on the Individual Eleven case and the implications and motives behind it.

Episodes.Title: Another Chance
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Mamoru Oshii
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Kevin Brief, Erik Davies
Episodes.Plot: The Prime Minister calls a meeting of her cabinet to discuss the refugee situation.

Episodes.Title: Red Data
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Mamoru Oshii
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Kevin Brief, Erik Davies
Episodes.Plot: Following Ishikawa's intelligence reports, the Major heads to Taiwan to investigate a lead on Kuze.

Episodes.Title: Trans Parent
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Mamoru Oshii, Kenji Kamiyama
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Kevin Brief, Fleet Cooper
Episodes.Plot: A patient undergoing a routine medical procedure unexpectedly takes a turn for the worst and the medical staff mount a frantic effort to save him.

Episodes.Title: Chain Reaction
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Mamoru Oshii
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Kirk Baily, Kevin Brief
Episodes.Plot: On Dejima island, a crisis is brewing. The refugees have moved away from Japan in an effort to create an autonomous region they can call their own.

Episodes.Title: Fabricate Fog
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Mamoru Oshii
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Kirk Baily, Kevin Brief
Episodes.Plot: Section 9 regroups from the fire fight and the body of their dead teammate is airlifted out of Dejima.

Episodes.Title: Embarrassment
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Mamoru Oshii
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Kirk Baily, Steve Blum
Episodes.Plot: Batou confronts Kuze in an effort to stop him from leaving with the plutonium, but Kuze proves to be a better fight than Batou and ends up disabling Batou's right leg and left arm and putting Batou out of commission.

Episodes.Title: Reversal Process
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Mamoru Oshii, Kenji Kamiyama
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Kirk Baily, Kevin Brief
Episodes.Plot: A tactical nuclear device has been discovered in the Kyushu Telecom Tower in the Japanese capital of Fukuoka and some 35 million citizens are subsequently evacuated over a five-day period to allow the Ground Self Defense Army to s...

Episodes.Title: Martial Law
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Mamoru Oshii
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, William Bassett, Steve Blum
Episodes.Plot: Prime Minister Kayabuki meets with her cabinet to discuss the Fukuoka nuclear bomb incident, but the cabinet has already decided to deploy the army to retrieve the remaining plutonium supposedly hidden on Dejima Island.

Episodes.Title: Nuclear Power
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Mamoru Oshii
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Kevin Brief, Joe Cappelletti
Episodes.Plot: The Chief Cabinet Secretary formally relieves the PM from her ministerial duties for her decision to call in the UN to mediate the Dejima crisis.

Episodes.Title: This Side of Justice
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Mamoru Oshii
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, Kevin Brief, Erik Davies
Episodes.Plot: The Tachikoma units, through the use of a satellite, have spotted an American Empire ballistic missile submarine carrying nuclear submarine-launched ballistic missiles off the coast of Okinawa.

Episodes.Title: Endless Gig
Episodes.Writer: Shirow Masamune, Kenji Kamiyama, Mamoru Oshii
Episodes.Actors: Dino Andrade, William Bassett, Johnny Yong Bosch
Episodes.Plot: The JMSDF lets loose with another round of naval artillery fire and missile strikes as refugees on Dejima attempt to evacuate the island aboard makeshift rafts and boats.
